creator: andy@codeedog.com
text:
Chapter 22 mentions Sun Microsystems three times: once as the originator of ZFS and twice with the words: "Sun™ recommends..."

As Sun is no longer a going concern, it cannot recommend a course of action. Its presence in the manual in these latter two places makes it appear this section is out of date. This should be changed, probably to "OpenZFS recommends..."
